# HelloWorld server multi-language test with aggressive timeouts

# Set aggressive timeouts for language testing  
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=2s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=1200ms
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=1s

# Start the server
exec timeout 15s go run . &
wait 150ms

# Test Spanish greeting
cat > spanish_greeting.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "Carlos",
      "language": "spanish"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 2s echo "$(<spanish_greeting.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Hola, Carlos!'

# Test French greeting
cat > french_greeting.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 2,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "Marie",
      "language": "french"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 2s echo "$(<french_greeting.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Bonjour, Marie!'

# Test German greeting
cat > german_greeting.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 3,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "Hans",
      "language": "german"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 2s echo "$(<german_greeting.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Hallo, Hans!'

# Test Japanese greeting
cat > japanese_greeting.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 4,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "田中",
      "language": "japanese"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 2s echo "$(<japanese_greeting.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'こんにちは, 田中!'

# Test Chinese greeting  
cat > chinese_greeting.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 5,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "李明",
      "language": "chinese"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 2s echo "$(<chinese_greeting.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout '你好, 李明!'

# Test case insensitive language
cat > case_test.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 6,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "Test",
      "language": "ENGLISH"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 2s echo "$(<case_test.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Hello, Test!'

# Test Portuguese greeting with fortune
cat > portuguese_fortune.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 7,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting_with_fortune",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "João",
      "language": "portuguese"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 2s echo "$(<portuguese_fortune.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Olá, João!'
stdout 'Your fortune:'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f spanish_greeting.json french_greeting.json german_greeting.json japanese_greeting.json chinese_greeting.json case_test.json portuguese_fortune.json
